basic_details.job_title: Indian Army CSBO Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 190 Civilian Switch Board Operator Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Army Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 190 vacancies for Civilian Switch Board Operator posts. Candidates can apply online only from 02.05.2026 to 31.05.2026 through Indian Army website indianarmy.nic.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Up to 40 years (45 years for SC/ST candidates)
basic_details.application_mode: Online only - via official email ID: [email protected] (PDF application form submitted as email attachment)

qualification.education_qualification: Candidate will be disqualified if found to have contracted a marriage while having a living spouse, or entered into another marriage

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 21,700/- + allowances (Level-3, Cell-1 as per 7th CPC Pay Matrix)

selection_process: Written Test (100 marks) + Practical Test (Qualifying) + Interview (Qualifying) + Medical Test
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official email ID [email protected]. Hard copy applications sent by post will not be accepted. The application window is open from 02-05-2026 (0001 Hrs) to 31-05-2026 (2359 Hrs). Candidates must open the PDF application form in Adobe Acrobat Reader ONLY - do NOT open in browser (Chrome/Edge) as fields may not work. All fields marked with * are mandatory and must not be left blank. All text must be typed in BLOCK LETTERS (CAPITALS).

basic_details.job_title: NIT Goa Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Goa Faculty Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 4 Faculty (Civil Engineering) vacancies on a temporary basis with salary up to Rs. 70,000 per month.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 50,000/- per month with Master's degree and Rs. 70,000/- per month with a Ph.D. Degree

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Goa Faculty Recruitment 2026.

items.name: IIT Goa – Technical Superintendent, Administrative Assistant – 4 Posts

basic_details.job_title: IIT Goa Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Technical Superintendent, Administrative Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Goa (IIT Goa) Recruitment 2026 is now open for 4 Technical Superintendent, Administrative Assistant posts. Candidates with Bachelor’s Degree,Diploma, B.Tech/B.E. in relevant fields can apply online from 06 May 2026 to 29 May 2026 through the IIT Goa website, iitgoa.ac.in.

age_limit.age_details: Max age 34 for Technical Superintendent, 27 for Administrative Assistant. Relaxation as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree (55% marks), Diploma in Electrical/Electronics & Communication/CSE/IT/ECE (60% marks), B.Tech/B.E. in relevant fields (60% marks)

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 4 & 6 of 7th CPC Pay Matrix

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Goa Various Posts Recruitment 2026.

items.name: Goa PSC – Assistant Engineer, Psychiatrist and More – 25 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Goa PSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 25 Assistant Engineer, Psychiatrist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Goa PSC Recruitment 2026: 25 Assistant Engineer, Psychiatrist and More vacancies. Apply online from 8 May to 22 May 2026 at gpsc.goa.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: (i) Degree in any branch from a recognized University or equivalent; (ii) Knowledge of Konkani.
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Engineer, Psychiatrist and More – 25 Posts

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: On or before the last date of submission of application (e-challan valid for 7 days from generation; stamped e-challan to be submitted to Commission's office on or before last date)

age_limit.age_details: Shortlisted candidates called for Interview. Date and details will be communicated via email/mobile/Commission's website.

how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the Commission's website at https://gpsc.goa.gov.in or the Government of Goa portal at https://cbes.goa.gov.in/. Candidates should carefully read the "Instructions" available on the Commission's website before filling the application online. The email address and mobile number of the candidate should invariably be provided in the application form. All candidates are advised to check their email accounts/mobile phones/Commission's website regularly for updates/notices concerning their application.
seo_tags: Goa Public Service Commission Assistant Engineer
